allow: PowerShell($out = npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Out-String; $mine = $out -split "`n" | Where-Object { $_ -match "audit|auth\\.ts|orders\\.action|admin-orders|delivery-agent-portal|sales-rep.history|history.page" }; if \($mine\) { $mine } else { "NO ERRORS IN CHANGED FILES" })

PowerShell($out = npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Out-String; $mine = $out -split "`n" | Where-Object { $_ -match "settings.page|profile-client|users\\.service|users\\.action" }; if \($mine\) { $mine } else { "NO ERRORS IN MY EDITED FILES" })

PowerShell($out = npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Out-String; $mine = $out -split "`n" | Where-Object { $_ -match "orders\\.action|orders\\.service|orders/\\[id\\]|order-detail-client" }; if \($mine\) { $mine } else { "NO ERRORS IN CHANGED FILES" })
PowerShell($out = npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Out-String; $out -split "`n" | Where-Object { $_ -match "error TS" })

PowerShell($out = npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Out-String; $mine = $out -split "`n" | Where-Object { $_ -match "admin-orders|admin/orders|order-detail-admin" }; if \($mine\) { $mine } else { "NO ERRORS IN CHANGED FILES" })

PowerShell($out = npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Out-String; $mine = $out -split "`n" | Where-Object { $_ -match "orders\\.action|admin-orders|order-detail-client|order-detail-admin" }; if \($mine\) { $mine } else { "NO ERRORS IN CHANGED FILES" })
PowerShell($out = npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Out-String; \($out -split "`n" | Where-Object { $_ -match "error TS" }\).Count)
PowerShell($out = npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Out-String; \($out -split "`n" | Where-Object { $_ -match "error TS" }\).Count; "----"; $out -split "`n" | Where-Object { $_ -match "error TS" })
